Jett Howard's two-way contract with the Dallas Mavericks will cover one season. Players are eligible to play on a two-way during their first four years in the league (or five years if they missed one entire season due to injury).
Howard will be an unrestricted free agent in 2027.

items.title: The Hawks had a 118.4 offensive rating (73rd percentile) with Dyson Daniels on the floor last season in more than 5,000 possessions.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks had a 118.4 offensive rating (73rd percentile) with Dyson Daniels on the floor last season in more than 5,000 possessions.

The Hawks had a 112.3 offensive rating (29th percentile) with Dyson Daniels off the floor in almost 3,000 possessions.

(this discrepancy was not a coincidence)

items.title: Hollander POTD Conner Henry. UCSB SF hustler was drafted 89th by HOU in 87. Made the team but was waived early in season. Hooked up w/BOS shortly after & played rest of season. In 87-88, played w/3 teams. From 88-98 was in CBA & Europe. Has coached in Australia & US since 2001.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
